_comment: Public Open Plugins MCP manifest for cursor.directory auto-detection. NO secrets. The hosted `mushi` server has no static auth headers on purpose: it speaks real OAuth (authorization code + PKCE), so `claude mcp login mushi` / your client's MCP login opens the console consent page and mints a revocable project API key for you. Prefer that. `mushi-stdio` uses ${ENV:-} placeholders and falls back to ~/.config/mushi/config.json written by `mushi login`. Install via https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/connect or `npx mushi-mushi setup --ide cursor`. Append ?read_only=1 to the hosted URL to hide write tools.
